title: Chapter 2
text: Laugh out loud with Junie B. Jones! #1 Junie B. Jones and the Stupid Smelly Bus #2 Junie B. Jones and a Little Monkey Business #3 Junie B. Jones and Her Big Fat Mouth #4 Junie B.
